function.name: clean_getout
output_expected

unit.comment: /* Convert a CURLUcode into a CURLcode */

function.name: urlerr_cvt

unit.comment: /* * Adds the file name to the URL if it doesn't already have one. * url will be freed before return if the returned pointer is different */

function.name: add_file_name_to_url

unit.comment: /* Extracts the name portion of the URL. * Returns a pointer to a heap-allocated string or NULL if * no name part, at location indicated by first argument. */

function.name: get_url_file_name
